<div class="WordSection1" markdown="1">

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Author:
Safa Rafique, Dr. <span class="SpellE">Nameem</span> Mahmood, Dr. Farooq
<span class="SpellE">sabir</span></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Package:
"<span class="SpellE">OmniVerse</span>: Integrated Bulk
RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> and Microarray Analysis"</span>

<span class="GramE"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">date</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: 2026-2-20</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">License:</span>

**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>Package
Overview</span>**

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span class="SpellE"><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">OmniVerse</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> is a comprehensive
Shiny</span>

<span class="GramE"><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">application</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> package for
analyzing bulk RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> and microarray data
from GEO datasets. It provides an integrated workflow supporting single
or multi-dataset merging, normalization, batch correction, differential
expression (<span class="SpellE">limma</span>/DESeq2), WGCNA
co-expression analysis, pathway enrichment (GO/KEGG), PPI networks
(<span class="SpellE">STRINGdb</span>), machine learning classification,
ROC validation, nomogram modeling, GSEA, and immune
deconvolution.</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Key
features include:</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">-<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">         
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">GEO query and download with
automatic</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:Symbol;mso-fareast-font-family:
Symbol;mso-bidi-font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">        
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">platform annotation (200+ GPLs mapped to
.<span class="SpellE">db</span> or
<span class="SpellE">biomaRt</span>)</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">-<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">         
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Gene symbol harmonization across
platforms</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:Symbol;mso-fareast-font-family:
Symbol;mso-bidi-font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">        
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">for multi-study integration</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">-<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">         
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Publication-ready plots (PCA,
volcano,</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:Symbol;mso-fareast-font-family:
Symbol;mso-bidi-font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">        
</span></span></span><span class="SpellE"><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">heatmaps</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">, module-trait
relationships) exported as PNG/PDF at 300 DPI</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">-<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">         
</span></span></span><span class="SpellE"><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">ReactiveValues</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">-based reactive
programming</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:Symbol;mso-fareast-font-family:
Symbol;mso-bidi-font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">        
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">for efficient large-dataset handling (up to
500 MB uploads)</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">-<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">         
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Bioconductor-compliant dependencies
loaded</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:Symbol;mso-fareast-font-family:
Symbol;mso-bidi-font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">        
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">via
\`<span class="SpellE">BiocManager</span>::install("<span class="SpellE">OmniVerse</span>")\`</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>Introduction</span>**

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Bulk
<span class="SpellE">transcriptomics</span>
(RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> and microarrays) remains
foundational for biomarker discovery, especially in diseases like
chronic myeloid leukemia where multi-omics integration reveals</span>

<span class="GramE"><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">robust</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> signatures.
<span class="SpellE">OmniVerse</span> addresses common pain points in
GEO analysis: platform heterogeneity, batch effects across studies, and
disjointed workflows by offering a unified, step-by-step pipeline from
raw GSE download to validated diagnostics.</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
Gungsuh">Designed for researchers without deep programming expertise, it
automates complex tasks like WGCNA module detection, common gene
intersection (DEGs ∩ modules), and ML consensus (RF/SVM/etc.) while
exposing parameters for customization. All results are downloadable
(CSV/RDS/PDF), with a narrative summary auto-generated for
manuscripts.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Getting
Start</span>**

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">To
install this package, start R and enter:</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image001.gif" v:shapes="Rectangle_x0020_2"
width="571" height="116"
alt="Text Box: if (!requireNamespace(&quot;BiocManager&quot;, quietly = TRUE)) install.packages(&quot;BiocManager&quot;) BiocManager::install(&quot;OmniVerse&quot;) " /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Once
installed, the package can be loaded and attached to your current
workspace as follows:</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image002.gif" v:shapes="Rectangle_x0020_5"
width="573" height="76"
alt="Text Box: library(&quot;OmniVerse&quot;)" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">To
launch the <span class="SpellE">OmniVerse</span> app, simply
run:<span style="color:#4D4D4C"></span></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image003.gif" v:shapes="Rectangle_x0020_1"
width="573" height="76" alt="Text Box: runOmniVerse()" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">This
opens an interactive web interface in your default browser where you
can:</span>

1.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Search and
    download GEO datasets (single or multiple GSEs)</span>
2.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo">Follow the guided workflow
    through normalization → DE → WGCNA → enrichment →
    ML</span><span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>
3.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Download
    publication-ready results and auto-generated analysis summary</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image004.gif" v:shapes="image41.png"
width="624" height="930" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C"></span>

 

## <span id="_bx899tmubd1l"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Section: Selecting the Analysis Framework</span>** [section-selecting-the-analysis-framework]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">In this step, you define the
core biological platform, the scope of your data, and the statistical
model used to identify differentially expressed (DE) genes.</span>

### <span id="_gmppa7nmqdkj"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C">1. Choose Platform</span>** [choose-platform]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">The first step is to identify
the technology used to generate your
<span class="SpellE">transcriptomics</span> data.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#4D4D4C"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span>:</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">
Select this for high-throughput sequencing data (raw or normalized
counts).</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#4D4D4C"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Microarray:</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">
Select this for intensity-based data from platforms like
<span class="SpellE">Affymetrix</span> or Illumina
beads.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#4D4D4C"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Merged
(Both):</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"> Use
this if your project integrates both RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span>
and Microarray data into a meta-analysis.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

### <span id="_yrd0netv0r5v"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C">2. Datasets Configuration</span>** [datasets-configuration]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">This section determines how
the tool handles technical variation between different
experiments.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#4D4D4C"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Single dataset (1
GSE):</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"> Best
for a single experiment. Batch correction is typically skipped as the
samples are assumed to be processed under uniform
conditions.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#4D4D4C"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Multiple
datasets:</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">
Choose this if you are combining data from different studies or
laboratories. The tool will recommend **batch correction** (e.g.,
<span class="SpellE">ComBat</span> or SVA) to remove non-biological "lab
effects" before downstream analysis.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

### <span id="_k3dc7d56bb4w"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C">3. Differential Expression (DE) Method</span>** [differential-expression-de-method]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">The choice of method depends
on your platform and the statistical distribution of your data:</span>

|  |  |  |
|----|----|----|
| **<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Method</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | **<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Recommendation</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | **<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Statistical Basis</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> |
| <span class="SpellE">**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">limma</span>**</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Microarray / Mixed data</span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Empirical Bayes linear modeling.</span> |
| <span class="SpellE">**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">limma-voom</span>**</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> counts</span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Transforms counts to log-CPM and estimates mean-variance relationship.</span> |
| **<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">DESeq2</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | **<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> counts</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
  line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
  &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Uses a **Negative Binomial** distribution; excellent for small sample sizes.</span> |
| <span class="SpellE">**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">edgeR</span>**</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> counts</span> | <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
  mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C">Uses quasi-likelihood to account for <span class="SpellE">overdispersion</span> in count data.</span> |

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image005.gif" v:shapes="image2.png" width="624"
height="367" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:141%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

## <span id="_fkv2leyrwqf9"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Multi-GSE Analysis Workflows</span>** [multi-gse-analysis-workflows]

## <span id="_xq6srztp8ss7"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Quick Example.1Multiple Bulk-RNA Datasets</span>** [quick-example.1multiple-bulk-rna-datasets]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Example:
GSE50760 + GSE104836</span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image006.gif" v:shapes="Rectangle_x0020_4"
width="573" height="76"
alt="Text Box: library(OmniVerse) runOmniVerse() " /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">\# <span class="GramE">In</span> the
app:</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">\# 1. Step 1: Enter "</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">GSE50760,
GSE104836</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo;color:#8E908C">" → Download both
datasets</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image007.gif" v:shapes="image35.png"
width="624" height="301" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

### <span id="_70ynaxlnniqx"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">2. Gene Overlap Analysis</span>*** [gene-overlap-analysis]

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Venn &
<span class="SpellE">UpSet</span> Plots</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">: These tools quantify how many genes are shared across
your different datasets.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Roboto Mono&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Dataset
Compatibility</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">: In
this case, both **GSE104836** and **GSE50760** share an identical set of
**37,673 genes**, indicating perfect alignment for a
meta-analysis.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Roboto Mono&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image008.gif" v:shapes="image37.png"
width="624" height="408" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

### <span id="_b0ik18gfk190"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">2.1 Expression Distribution (QC Plots)</span>*** [expression-distribution-qc-plots]

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Boxplot</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Visualizes the range of raw expression values for every sample;
horizontal consistency across "boxes" suggests high-quality, comparable
data.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Roboto Mono&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Density
Plot</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Shows the frequency of expression levels. The "hockey-stick" curve (high
density at low values) is typical for raw
RNA-<span class="SpellE">seq</span> data and confirms that normalization
is required to balance the distribution.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Roboto Mono&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image009.gif" v:shapes="image52.png"
width="624" height="240" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Roboto Mono&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image010.gif" v:shapes="image13.png"
width="624" height="262" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

## <span id="_39qru1af5lpj"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">2.2 Outlier Detection and Sample Filtering</span>*** [outlier-detection-and-sample-filtering]

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">The
final checkpoint in Quality Control is identifying "outliers"—samples
that behave so differently from the rest of the group that they might
negatively impact the statistical power of your analysis.</span>*

### <span id="_jo7zggnoxuab"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>Principal Component Analysis (PCA)</span>*** [principal-component-analysis-pca]

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">The
PCA plot reduces thousands of gene expressions into two main dimensions
(\$PC1\$ and \$PC2\$) to show how samples relate to each other.</span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Clustering:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">
Samples from the same dataset (pink vs. blue) generally cluster
together.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">The
Ellipse:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> The
dashed line represents the <span class="SpellE">**Mahalanobis**</span>
**threshold**.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Detection:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> Any
sample falling outside this circle (marked with a **triangle**) is
flagged as a statistical outlier. In your data, sample **GSM1228184** is
clearly separated from the main group.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

### <span id="_4z8nl8t9ae17"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>Sample Connectivity</span>*** [sample-connectivity]

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">This
bar chart measures how well each sample "connects" or correlates with
all other samples in the network.</span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">The Red Dashed
Line:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> This
is the threshold (\$mean - 2 \times SD\$).</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Low
Connectivity:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">
Samples with connectivity significantly lower than the rest of the group
are often technically flawed or degraded.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

### <span id="_icsiaiw39tbv"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>Outlier Summary & Exclusion</span>*** [outlier-summary-exclusion]

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">The
tool provides a definitive table and an action box to clean your
data:</span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Outlier Summary
Table:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">
Lists specific metrics like
<span class="SpellE">**Mahal_Distance**</span>. For example,
**GSM1228184** has a distance of **7.56**, exceeding the **7.38**
threshold.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Exclude Selected
Outliers:</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> This
interactive panel allows you to check the flagged samples and click the
red button to remove them from all future steps.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<img src="vignette_files/image011.gif" data-align="left"
data-hspace="12" v:shapes="image51.png" width="538" height="351" />*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

***<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>***

 

***<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"><span style="mso-spacerun:yes"> </span>4:
Select Groups</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">, you
define the biological comparison for your study by assigning samples to
specific categories.</span>*

### <span id="_6i90g3sgnb07"></span><span class="GramE">***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">4.1<span style="mso-spacerun:yes">  </span>Metadata</span>***</span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> Exploration & Selection</span>*** [metadata-exploration-selection]

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span><span class="SpellE">***<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Phenodata</span>***</span>***<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">
Browser</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Browse metadata columns (e.g., </span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#188038">tissue<span class="GramE">:ch1</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">,
</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#188038">title</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">)
across your datasets to identify where group information is
stored.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Column
Selection</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Choose the relevant phenotype column for each dataset and click
**Extract Groups** to pull raw labels.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

### <span id="_dhgm94l8gmxg"></span><span class="GramE">***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">4.2<span style="mso-spacerun:yes">  </span>Group</span>***</span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"> Categorization</span>*** [group-categorization]

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Standardization</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Manually map various raw labels (e.g., "primary colorectal cancer" or
"colon cancer tissue") into a single consistent group name like
**"Disease"**.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Control
Assignment</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Assign baseline samples (e.g., "<span class="SpellE">nontumor</span>
colon tissue") to a **"Normal"** group to serve as the reference for
comparison.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image012.gif" v:shapes="image42.png"
width="624" height="317" /><img src="vignette_files/image013.gif" v:shapes="image1.png" width="624"
height="323" /><img src="vignette_files/image014.gif" v:shapes="image18.png"
width="624" height="402" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

***<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Final
Count</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Confirm the total sample size (e.g., **28 Normal** vs. **45 Disease**)
and the final gene count (21,927) before proceeding.</span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image015.gif" v:shapes="image34.png"
width="624" height="373" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span class="GramE">*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">5.Batch</span>*</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">
effect removal:</span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image016.gif" v:shapes="image22.png"
width="624" height="273" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image017.gif" v:shapes="image17.png"
width="624" height="399" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image018.gif" v:shapes="image6.png" width="624"
height="394" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">To wrap up your vignette, here is a concise description
for the **Differential Expression (DE) Results** section:</span>*

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

### <span id="_yzjrj8xso10s"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Step 6: Differential Expression Results</span>*** [step-6-differential-expression-results]

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">This final step identifies genes with statistically
significant changes between your defined groups (e.g., Disease vs.
Normal).</span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">DE
Parameters</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Setting a <span class="SpellE">**LogFC**</span> **cutoff of 1** filters
for genes with at least a 2-fold expression change, while an **Adj.
P-value of 0.05** ensures statistical reliability by minimizing false
positives.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Volcano
Plot</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
This visualizes the global distribution of your data. **Up-regulated
genes** (red) show increased expression in the disease group, while
**Down-regulated genes** (blue) show a significant
decrease.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Top 50
<span class="SpellE">Heatmap</span></span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">: The
platform clusters the **top 50 DEGs** to show consistent expression
patterns across samples. This provides a high-level view of the
"molecular signature" defining the disease state.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image017.gif" v:shapes="image43.png"
width="624" height="399" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image019.gif" v:shapes="image36.png"
width="619" height="283" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image020.gif" v:shapes="image5.png" width="624"
height="314" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

### <span id="_p8dpwlrhoiyb"></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Step 7: WGCNA Analysis</span>*** [step-7-wgcna-analysis]

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">WGCNA
identifies clusters (modules) of co-expressed genes and relates them to
your biological groups (Disease vs. Normal).</span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Soft-Threshold
Selection</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">: The
analysis uses a power function to achieve a **Scale-Free Topology**.
Based on the plots, a power (soft-threshold) is chosen where the R\^2
curve flattens (typically \>0.80) to ensure a biologically meaningful
network.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Module
Generation</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Genes are grouped into distinct color-coded modules (e.g., Turquoise,
Blue, Brown) based on their expression similarity.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Module-Trait
Relationship</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Each module is correlated with the sample groups. A **Positive
Correlation** (red) indicates the module is up-regulated in Disease,
while a **Negative Correlation** (blue) indicates
down-regulation.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;color:#8E908C;mso-bidi-font-style:
italic"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">    
</span></span></span>***<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">Hub Gene
Identification</span>****<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C">:
Within the most significant modules, genes with the highest **Module
Membership (MM)** and **Gene Significance (GS)** are identified as "Hub
Genes," serving as key drivers of the disease
profile.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image021.gif" v:shapes="image24.png"
width="624" height="260" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image022.gif" v:shapes="image10.png"
width="624" height="392" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image023.gif" v:shapes="image19.png"
width="624" height="388" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image024.gif" v:shapes="image11.png"
width="624" height="359" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image025.gif" v:shapes="image8.png" width="624"
height="403" /></span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#8E908C"></span>*

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C"></span>*

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image026.gif" v:shapes="image47.png"
width="623" height="328" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image027.gif" v:shapes="image44.png"
width="624" height="401" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

### <span id="_97jnbv4hc3we"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">Common Genes & KEGG Pathway Analysis</span>** [common-genes-kegg-pathway-analysis]

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Identifying Common
Genes</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: The platform
intersects the **Top DEGs** with the most significant **WGCNA Module
Genes** to identify a "high-confidence" gene set that is both
differentially expressed and highly co-expressed.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">GO (Gene Ontology)
analysis identifies the specific biological processes, cellular
components, and molecular functions significantly enriched within your
target gene set.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">KEGG
Enrichment</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: These common
genes are mapped against the **KEGG Database** to identify statistically
enriched biological pathways.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image028.gif" v:shapes="image30.png"
width="624" height="289" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image029.gif" v:shapes="image32.png"
width="624" height="306" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image030.gif" v:shapes="image26.png"
width="624" height="322" /><img src="vignette_files/image031.gif" v:shapes="image16.png"
width="624" height="364" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image032.gif" v:shapes="image23.png"
width="581" height="446" /><img src="vignette_files/image033.gif" v:shapes="image40.png"
width="581" height="372" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

### <span id="_6eq51l74sjkv"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">Step 10: PPI Network and Hub Gene Identification</span>** [step-10-ppi-network-and-hub-gene-identification]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">This
step visualizes the physical and functional interactions between your
candidate proteins to identify central biological drivers.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">PPI Network
Construction</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: The common genes
are mapped to the STRING database to build an interaction network, where
nodes represent proteins and edges represent documented
interactions.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Interaction
Threshold</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: A confidence
score threshold (typically **\> 0.40** for medium or **\> 0.70** for
high confidence) is applied to filter out weak or predicted
interactions, ensuring only robust connections
remain.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Hub Gene Selection
(N-Factor)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: Using the
<span class="SpellE">**cytoHubba**</span> plugin or degree-centrality
algorithms, we select the top **N-factor** genes (e.g., top 10 or 20)
with the highest connectivity.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Network
Visualization</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: The final graph
highlights these "Hubs" in warmer colors (red/orange) to signify their
critical role as the most influential nodes in the disease-associated
network.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image034.gif" v:shapes="image20.png"
width="624" height="265" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image035.gif" v:shapes="image4.png" width="624"
height="243" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image023.gif" v:shapes="image15.png"
width="624" height="388" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

### <span id="_1wqhkbz5vpg4"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">Step 11: Machine Learning Classification</span>** [step-11-machine-learning-classification]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">This
step evaluates how well the selected hub genes can distinguish between
**Disease** and **Normal** samples.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Model
Selection</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: Common algorithms
used include **Random Forest (RF)** for robustness, **Support Vector
Machines (SVM)** for high-dimensional accuracy, and **LASSO Regression**
for further feature refinement.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image036.gif" v:shapes="image27.png"
width="624" height="393" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image037.gif" v:shapes="image3.png" width="624"
height="297" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

### <span id="_lasi9lllok49"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">Step 11: Internal and External Validation</span>** [step-11-internal-and-external-validation]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Validation
ensures that the identified biomarkers and machine learning models are
