robust, reproducible, and not the result of over-fitting to a single
dataset.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Internal
Validation</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">:</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Uses the original
discovery datasets (e.g., GSE50760 and GSE104836).</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Employs techniques
like **k-fold cross-validation** or a **70/30 train-test split** to
assess model stability.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Metrics like the
**Confusion Matrix** and **ROC-AUC** are calculated to confirm high
diagnostic accuracy within the study population.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">External
Validation</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">:</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Tests the model and
hub genes on entirely independent datasets (e.g., TCGA or a separate GSE
study) not seen during the training phase.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Verifies that the
**Hub Genes** (like *INHBA* or *MMP7*) maintain consistent expression
patterns (up/down-regulation) in different patient
cohorts.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">○<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">A high **Validation
AUC** proves the biomarkers are universal signatures of the disease
rather than technical artifacts of the original
lab.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image038.gif" v:shapes="image25.png"
width="624" height="331" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image039.gif" v:shapes="image7.png" width="624"
height="295" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

### <span id="_noivzchisiqb"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">Step 12: AUC-Based Gene Selection and Comparison</span>** [step-12-auc-based-gene-selection-and-comparison]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">The
**ROC (Receiver Operating Characteristic)** curve and its **AUC (Area
<span class="GramE">Under</span> the Curve)** score are the "gold
standards" for determining how effectively a gene can distinguish
between Disease and Normal samples.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Calculating AUC
Scores</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: We calculate an
individual AUC score for each candidate gene from your PPI and ML
feature list. A score of **1.0** represents perfect classification,
while **0.5** represents random chance.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Internal
Comparison</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: We compare the
AUC scores within your primary discovery dataset. Genes with an **AUC \>
0.85** are prioritized as strong "internal" biomarkers with high
sensitivity and specificity.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">External
Cross-Validation</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: To ensure these
genes aren't "over-fitted" to one study, we run the same AUC analysis on
an **External Validation Dataset**. We specifically select genes that
maintain a high AUC (e.g., **\> 0.80**) across both internal and
external cohorts.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Selecting Top
Biomarkers</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: The final
"Hub-Biomarkers" are chosen based on a combination
of:</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">1.<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">     
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">High
AUC</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> in both discovery
and validation sets.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">2.<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">     
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Consistency</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> in expression
direction (always <span class="GramE">Up</span> or always
Down).</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">3.<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">     
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Low
P-value</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> in the initial DE
analysis.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image040.gif" v:shapes="image45.png"
width="624" height="407" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image041.gif" v:shapes="image38.png"
width="624" height="356" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image042.gif" v:shapes="image50.png"
width="624" height="293" /><img src="vignette_files/image043.gif" v:shapes="image29.png"
width="624" height="263" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">13
Nomogram Model</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">The
Nomogram translates the statistical results of your machine learning
model into a visual scoring system for clinical use.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Construction</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: Each of the
selected **Hub Genes** (e.g., *INHBA*, *MMP7*) is assigned a point scale
based on its regression coefficient. The sum of these points corresponds
to a specific **Predicted Probability** of the
<span class="GramE">disease .</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Calibration
Plot</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: We test the
nomogram's accuracy by plotting **Predicted vs. Observed** outcomes. A
curve close to the 45-degree diagonal indicates that the model's
predictions are highly <span class="GramE">reliable
.</span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Decision Curve
Analysis (DCA)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: This test
calculates the "Net Benefit" of using the nomogram in a clinical setting
compared to a "treat-all" or "treat-none"
strategy.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Internal/External
Testing</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: We run the
nomogram on both the discovery and validation cohorts to ensure the
**C-index** (concordance index) remains consistently high (e.g., **\>
0.80**), proving the model's practical utility.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image044.gif" v:shapes="image39.png"
width="624" height="303" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image045.gif" v:shapes="image28.png"
width="624" height="347" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image046.gif" v:shapes="image21.png"
width="624" height="241" /></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>**

## <span id="_mzzvjr55j7rm"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#1F1F1F">14. GSEA Analysis</span>** [gsea-analysis]

## <span id="_rrhtmv540bnu"></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#1F1F1F">Unlike KEGG or GO which only look at the "Top" genes, GSEA considers the entire ranked list of genes to identify subtle but coordinated shifts in biological pathways.</span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>** [unlike-kegg-or-go-which-only-look-at-the-top-genes-gsea-considers-the-entire-ranked-list-of-genes-to-identify-subtle-but-coordinated-shifts-in-biological-pathways.]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

## <span id="_8q2exvnhstwq"></span><span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image047.gif" v:shapes="image33.png"
width="624" height="328" /></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>** [section]

## <span id="_la0l3jwvmqs1"></span><span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image048.gif" v:shapes="image14.png"
width="624" height="336" /></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>** [section-1]

### <span id="_tbuv7ww98ep0"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:black">15.<span style="mso-spacerun:yes">  </span>Immune Cell Infiltration Analysis</span>** [immune-cell-infiltration-analysis]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">This
step uses algorithms like **CIBERSORT**,
<span class="SpellE">**ssGSEA**</span>, or
<span class="SpellE">**xCell**</span> to estimate the relative abundance
of different infiltrating immune cells (e.g., T cells, Macrophages, B
cells) from your bulk gene expression data.</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Relative Abundance
(<span class="SpellE">Barplot</span>)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: Displays the proportion of 22 (or more)
different immune cell types across all individual samples. Each bar
represents a sample, and the colored segments show the immune
composition, allowing you to see overall
heterogeneity.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Differential
Infiltration (Violin or Box Plots)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">:
Compares the immune landscape between your defined groups (Disease vs.
Normal). These plots highlight which specific immune cells are
significantly enriched or depleted in the disease
state.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Immune Cell
Correlation
(<span class="SpellE">Correlogram</span>/Matrix)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">: A
<span class="SpellE">heatmap</span> that evaluates the relationships
between different immune cell populations. Red indicates positive
correlation (cells that infiltrate together), while blue indicates
negative correlation (mutually exclusive cells).  
+1</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Gene-Immune
Correlation (Scatter Plots)</span>**<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">:
Analyzes the relationship between your previously identified **Hub
Genes** (e.g., from WGCNA/PPI) and specific immune cell types. This
helps determine if your key biomarkers are directly driving or
suppressing specific immune responses.</span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"></span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image049.gif" v:shapes="image12.png"
width="624" height="298" /><img src="vignette_files/image025.gif" v:shapes="image9.png" width="624"
height="403" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image050.gif" v:shapes="image48.png"
width="624" height="414" /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

### <span id="_stdtqk3ddu4s"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:black">Step 16: Summary and Conclusion</span>** [step-16-summary-and-conclusion]

## <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">This final step synthesizes the findings from the entire bioinformatics and machine learning pipeline, highlighting the clinical and biological significance of your study.</span> [this-final-step-synthesizes-the-findings-from-the-entire-bioinformatics-and-machine-learning-pipeline-highlighting-the-clinical-and-biological-significance-of-your-study.]

## <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Workflow Recap: The study successfully integrated Differential Expression (DE), WGCNA, and Protein-Protein Interaction (PPI) networks to narrow down thousands of genes into a highly specific subset of disease drivers.</span> [workflow-recap-the-study-successfully-integrated-differential-expression-de-wgcna-and-protein-protein-interaction-ppi-networks-to-narrow-down-thousands-of-genes-into-a-highly-specific-subset-of-disease-drivers.]

## <span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Biomarker Discovery: Using advanced Machine Learning algorithms, we identified and validated robust Hub Genes that maintain high diagnostic accuracy (High AUC) across both internal and external independent datasets.</span> [biomarker-discovery-using-advanced-machine-learning-algorithms-we-identified-and-validated-robust-hub-genes-that-maintain-high-diagnostic-accuracy-high-auc-across-both-internal-and-external-independent-datasets.]

## <span id="_ujipbemyef3d"></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Clinical Utility: The translation of these ML features into a clinical Nomogram provides a practical, highly calibrated tool for personalized disease prediction.</span> [clinical-utility-the-translation-of-these-ml-features-into-a-clinical-nomogram-provides-a-practical-highly-calibrated-tool-for-personalized-disease-prediction.]

## <span id="_fp5j7dsj5050"></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Biological Mechanisms: Functional enrichment (KEGG/GO/GSEA) and Immune Infiltration analyses mapped out the underlying molecular pathways and microenvironment changes, offering new insights into disease pathogenesis and potential therapeutic targets.</span> [biological-mechanisms-functional-enrichment-kegggogsea-and-immune-infiltration-analyses-mapped-out-the-underlying-molecular-pathways-and-microenvironment-changes-offering-new-insights-into-disease-pathogenesis-and-potential-therapeutic-targets.]

## <span id="_sj9vf4xmm9fc"></span><span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image051.gif" v:shapes="image31.png"
width="624" height="412" /></span><span id="_39hf5prvde00"></span><span id="_ellrurq504h4"></span><span id="_16wdshcet751"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>** [section-2]

## <span id="_q7cw27fq856r"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Quick Example 2: Single GEO Dataset Analysis</span>** [quick-example-2-single-geo-dataset-analysis]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">The
simplest workflow analyzes a single GEO dataset:</span>

<span lang="EN"><img src="vignette_files/image006.gif" v:shapes="Rectangle_x0020_3"
width="573" height="76"
alt="Text Box: library(OmniVerse) runOmniVerse() " /></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#4D4D4C"></span>

 

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">\# <span class="GramE">In</span> the
app:</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;
color:#8E908C">\# 1. Step 1: Enter GSE ID (e.g.,
"</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">GSE50760</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo;color:#8E908C">") →
Download</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo;color:#8E908C">\#
2. Step 2: Select Disease/Normal grouping →
Normalize</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

*<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo;color:#8E908C">\#
3. Step 3-16: Run complete pipeline → Download
results</span>*<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:141%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;color:#4D4D4C"></span>

 

## <span id="_okyls8ejls4v"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Input Requirements</span>** [input-requirements]

<span class="SpellE"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">OmniVerse</span></span><span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"> handles all microarray and bulk-RNA data
processing internally from GEO accession numbers:</span>

1.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">GEO GSE
    ID(s): Single GSE (e.g., "GSE50760") </span>
2.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Group
    labels: Disease vs Normal (auto-detected or user-defined)</span>
3.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Analysis
    parameters: Adjustable at each step (default values
    Bioconductor-optimized)</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">No
pre-processing required - raw GEO data is automatically:</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia;mso-bidi-font-family:Georgia"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Downloaded via
<span class="SpellE">GEOquery</span></span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia;mso-bidi-font-family:Georgia"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Platform-annotated (200+ GPLs
supported)</span>

<span lang="EN"
style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Georgia;mso-bidi-font-family:Georgia"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">●<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">      
</span></span></span><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;
line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Normalized
(RMA/<span class="SpellE">voom</span>)</span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:
12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

 

## <span id="_22l9l0jd6pfp"></span>**<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:125%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Workflow Summary</span>** [workflow-summary]

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">The
app guides you through 16 steps:</span>

1.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo">GEO Download → 2. Quality
    Control → 3. Normalization </span><span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:
         115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>
2.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo">Differential Expression
    (<span class="SpellE">limma</span>/DESeq2) → 6. WGCNA → 7. Common
    Genes (DEGs ∩ modules)</span><span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;
         line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:
         &quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>
3.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo">GO/KEGG Enrichment → 9. PPI
    Networks (<span class="SpellE">STRINGdb</span>) → 10. Machine
    Learning</span><span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>
4.  <span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:Cardo">ROC Validation → 12. Nomogram
    → 13. GSEA → 14. Immune Deconvolution</span><span lang="EN"
    style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;
         mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;"></span>

<span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;line-height:115%;
font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;mso-fareast-font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;">Each
step produces downloadable plots/tables with one-click PDF/CSV
export</span>

</div>
